name: rule options: resolved options are part of the per-rule cache key (E-12 cache invalidates on options change)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/rule-cache && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule g-x-001 --in "$PWD/f.js" --options '{"max":5}' --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>r1.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule g-x-001 --in "$PWD/f.js" --options '{"max":7}' --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>r2.json && grep -E '"cache_status":"miss"' r2.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
